description: International outlaw motorcycle club formed in Perth, Australia in 1970. Expanded internationally by patching over Norwegian gangs in 2004-2005. Involved in violent conflict with the Mongrel Mob in the 1980s. Currently active in Australia, Norway, and Germany.

country_links.context: The Coffin Cheaters have a presence in Germany as part of their region served.

country_links.evidence_quote: later 'patched over' two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, in 2004 and 2005 respectively.
country_links.context: The Coffin Cheaters patched over two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, establishing a presence in Norway.
